use_cases: Display course or module completion percentage in educational platforms
Show task or project progress in project management dashboards
Indicate file upload or download status in web applications
Visualize survey or form completion rate in data collection tools
Represent analytics metrics like goal completion or KPIs in SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A lightweight animated progress bar component built with Framer Motion that displays percentage-based progress using a smooth spring animation. Supports customizable labels, colors, and styling through Tailwind className props. Ideal for visualizing completion states, upload progress, or metric indicators in any web application.
